scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.worker.json --noEmit
scripts.deploy:stage: bun run build && wrangler deploy --env stage
scripts.deploy:dev: bun run build && wrangler deploy --env dev
scripts.deploy: bun run build && wrangler deploy --env production
